positive: An elegant, stylized symmetrical arrangement of mystical forest elements: glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, entangled ivy vines, delicate fern fronds, and stylized lunar orchids. The composition must be centered and highly detailed, rendered in a clean vector art style with deep navy, ethereal aqua, silver, and moss green color palette. Focus on strong negative space, sharp silhouettes, and symmetrical balance, suitable for a repeatable print pattern. Studio lighting, graphic novel aesthetic, hyperdetailed, trending on Artstation, 8K.
